examples: A man of indecision is infuriating to watch.
After months of indecision, the government gave the plan the go-ahead on Monday.
Indecision is the thief of opportunity and enterprise.
Of course being honest about the hefty price of procrastination and indecision can make you squirm.
Indecision is debilitating, and indecision around what should be non-decisions simply saps our energy.
